sourceRef: tip:A short script for dropping students in Enrollment Manager

slides.headline: Script for Dropping Students
slides.body: Master the Enrollment Manager process with a consistent script.

slides.headline: Identify the Need
slides.body: Determine why the student is being dropped.
bullets: Review any outstanding requirements or incomplete forms.

slides.headline: Gather Documentation
slides.body: Collect all necessary documentation for the drop.
bullets: Ask the student to submit any required forms.
Verify if the student has completed all necessary steps.

slides.headline: Locate the Form
slides.body: Navigate to the correct form in the Enrollment Manager system.
bullets: Locate the appropriate enrollment drop form.
Ensure the correct student's record is open.

slides.headline: Follow the Script
slides.body: Input the student's details and finalize the drop.
bullets: Enter the student's name and ID.
Select the drop date and reason.

slides.headline: Communicate the Decision
slides.body: Notify the student and relevant parties of the drop decision.
bullets: Document the communication in the student's file.

slides.body: Apply the script in your workflow. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the Enrollment Manager process with a consistent script. Drop students efficiently with these five steps. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, as it could benefit from a more engaging visual to capture attention.
